strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience, exceeding the minimum requirement
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators) at re:cinq
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience with GISCollective, an open-source platform with enterprise adoption
concerns: Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI-related field (only a BS in Computer Science)
Limited explicit cloud or AI product/platform experience (mostly web/mobile/backend engineering)
No clear recognition as AI expert via publications, patents, or widely adopted AI products
response.justification: Bogdan’s extensive software engineering background and recent AI-agent work are strong positives, but his resume lacks depth in cloud/AI platform strategy and formal AI expertise (e.g., degrees, patents, or widely recognized contributions). The entrepreneurial GISCollective project is notable but not directly aligned with cloud/AI strategy. His technical breadth is impressive, but the role demands deeper AI/cloud leadership.
